scores.notes: Text accuracy is good overall, but there are several instances of concatenated words in the product descriptions (e.g., 'LEDIuminaireforarchitecturallighting', 'recessedmountedversionwithadjustablemountingbracket', 'corrosion-resistantsteel'). Numeric precision is high, with only minor formatting issues like '32Cto8°℃' instead of '32°C to 8°C'. Table structure and layout preservation are very good. Completeness is also good, with no major missing information.
